items.hook: Christopher Nolan’s Odyssey used occupied land as a film set. That feels like a betrayal | Mohamed Sleiman Labat
items.body: The decision to shoot in Moroccan-occupied Western Sahara, where the Indigenous people can’t tell their stories without fear of imprisonment, helps erase our own brutal journey

items.hook: The Invite review – A-list ensemble electrify hilarious couples night gone wrong comedy
items.body:
Sundance film festival: Olivia Wilde, Seth Rogen, Penelope Cruz and Edward Norton are exceptional in a smart and funny winner about sex, marriage and partner-swapping

Not enough people managed to see last year’s se

items.hook: "The Kill Room Where It Happens" is the eighth episode of the American crime drama mystery television series Dexter: Resurrection, sequel to Dexter and Dexter: New Blood.
items.body: The episode was written by Tony Saltzman from a story by Saltzman and Dane Anderson, and directed by producer Monica Raymund. One of those things you can't un-know.

items.hook: Ten unheard tracks from David Bowie's early career to be released
items.body: The previously unheard tracks from the 1960s were recorded when Bowie went by the stage name Davie Jones.

items.hook: Up All Night by Imogen Willetts review – a seductive history of going out
items.body:
From 18th-century pleasure gardens to Studio 54, the story of nightlife in all its hedonistic – and political – glory

In this fabulous alternative history of the modern world, the academic and “party historian” Imogen Willetts look

items.hook: The Boy with Two Mothers is a 1929 novel by the Italian writer Massimo Bontempelli.
items.body: It is about a seven-year-old boy in Rome who suddenly stops recognising his mother, claims his name is Ramiro and not Mario, and demands to be taken to a woman he says is his real mother, whose son Ramiro had died seven years earlier. Worth a quiet trip down t

items.hook: Jesy Nelson calls plan to test newborns for life-limiting muscle condition a 'victory'
items.body: All newborn babies are set to have a heel prick test for Spinal Muscular Atrophy (SMA) in England.

items.hook: Ava DuVernay to make Netflix documentary 14th on birthright citizenship
items.body:
The film-maker behind Selma and 13th will focus on the 14th amendment for a new film out later this year as Donald Trump targets those protected by it

Ava DuVernay announc

items.hook: "Lijepa naša domovino" is the national anthem of Croatia.
items.body: Often simply referred to as "Lijepa naša" in Croatia, it is a phrase widely used as a metonym for the country. Worth a quiet trip down the rabbit hole.

items.hook: ‘A masterpiece in every way’: The Odyssey earns near universal acclaim as full reviews published
items.body:
Christopher Nolan’s epic was given five stars by the Guardian, Independent and Telegraph, while the New York Times called it a ‘monumental adaptation’

Christopher Nolan’s $250m Imax blockbuster version of Homer’s epic poem the Odys

items.hook: COMCEPT, acronym for Comunidade Céptica Portuguesa, is a Portuguese project dedicated to scientific skepticism, created to promote rational and critical thinking about paranormal and pseudoscientific claims from a scientific point of view.
items.body: Other subjects that are dealt with include conspiracy theories and disinformation that circulate in mass media or on social media. The world is stranger than it lets on.
